---
title: "Alexis Weber"
image: media/headshot1.png
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexisweber/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/alexisweber
---

### Computational scientist • Single-Cell Multiomics • R / Python

[GitHub: https://github.com/alexisweber](GitHub: https://github.com/alexisweber)\

[**CV (PDF)**](assets/cv/Alex_Weber_CV.pdf)

## About

I implement combinatorial approaches to analyze differential gene regulation networks with multiomic methods. I earned my Ph.D. in Human Genetics from UCLA in 2025, generating an in vitro and in vivo, multiomic atlas of Ts21 neocortex. I am skilled in computational science, biostatistics, machine learning, neuroscience, genetics and genomics.

## Projects

Trisomy 21 Neocortex Multiome Atlas \
[Repo](https://github.com/alexisweber/Ts21_Neocortex_singleNucleiMultiome)· Demo

Trisomy 21 NPC Multiome Atlas [Repo](https://github.com/alexisweber/Ts21_phNPC_singleNucleiMultiome)
